repo.description: ICRA 2021 - Robust Place Recognition using an Imaging Lidar

terms.context_snippet: A place recognition package using high-resolution imaging lidar. For best performance, a lidar equipped with more than 64 uniformly distributed channels is strongly recommended, i.e., [Ouster OS1-128 lidar](https://ouster.com/products/os1-lidar-sensor/).

A place recognition package using high-resolution imaging lidar. For best performance, a lidar equipped with more than 64 uniformly distributed channels is strongly recommended, i.e., [Ouster OS1-128 lidar](https://ouster.com/products/os1-lidar-sensor/).
